Pick the next smallest task from `plan/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`. Provide acceptance criteria and validation steps.

## GitHub Issue Integration

- Before starting a new task, search for an open GitHub Issue matching the task description.
- If no issue exists, create a new GitHub Issue with a clear title and description.
- Update the Issue with progress and link related PRs.
